name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Fluent 2-styled checkbox with shadcn APIs. Built on @base-ui/react's Checkbox primitive for real form participation and keyboard behavior; supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states with Fluent's checkmark/dash glyphs from @fluentui/react-icons.
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
